passages.week_00:
THE DENTIST LOVED MY TEETH
AND SAID HE WOULD SEE ME
IN SIX MONTHS. TOO SOON!!
passages.week_01:
FOOD AND MY TEETH
GET ALONG SO WELL.
WE GOTTA FLOSS!!
passages.week_02:
I FEEL A TINGLE.
IS IT THE FLOSS?
IS IT A NEW FRIEND?
passages.week_03:
I CAN'T RIGHT NOW.
THE DENTIST WILL FORGIVE.
passages.week_04:
MY MOUTH IS CRAWLING
WITH BAD THINGS.
passages.week_05:
THE TINGLES CONTINUE.
MY TEETH DO TINGLE.
PLEASE STOP THE TINGLE!
passages.week_06:
THIS WEEK WE SHOULD DO
A BETTER JOB THAN NORMAL.
passages.week_07:
16 TEETH IS TOO MANY.
- I WOULD RATHER HAVE
ONE BIG TOOTH!
passages.week_08: I HATE PEOPLE IN MY MOUTH.
passages.week_09:
I SWALLOW TOOTHPASTE.
NO ONE FEEDS ME BECAUSE
MY TEETH SMELL TERRIBLE.
passages.week_0a:
I KNOW YOU'RE JEALOUS
OF THIS BIG SMILE!
passages.week_0b:
TOOTH BE 
     OR 
NOT TOOTH BE?
passages.week_0c:
THE TOOTH FAIRY IS 
A LIAR AND THIEF.
passages.week_0d:
MY PILLOW COVERS THE
DUST FROM MY BRAIN.
passages.week_0e:
NINE IN TEN DENTISTS
SAY SMILE MORE, IT
MAKES YOU PRETTIER.
passages.week_10:
THE TOOTHPASTE TINGLES.
MY MOUTH ALREADY
TINGLES. WHAT'S THE DIFF?
passages.week_11:
I SWALLOW THE FLOSS!
IT CLEANSES MY SOUL!
passages.week_12:
GROWING NEW TEETH IS
EASY, RIGHT?
passages.week_13:
I HEARD SHARKS GROW
THEIR TEETH BACK. I
WANT TO BE A SHARK!
passages.week_14:
IF TEETH COULD THINK
THEY'D RUN FROM BOTH
OF US ALL!
passages.week_15:
I'M MAKING TROPHIES
FROM MY PLAQUE!
passages.week_16:
THE TOOTH FAIRY IS NOT
GETTING ANY OF MY TEETH!
passages.week_17:
WE ONLY CLEAN MY TEETH
  ON SUNDAY BECAUSE
   GOD IS WATCHING.
passages.week_18:
CAN I REPLACE TEETH WITH
SCULPTURES MADE OF
TOOTHPASTE AND FLOSS?
passages.week_19:
ITS BEEN SIX MONTHS?!?
 THE DENTIST NEXT WEEK!?!
MY SMILE SMELLS OF DEATH!!
passages.week_1a:
THE DENTIST WANTS TO
  KISS ME!  HELP!!!  THE
DENTIST HAS THE WORST TEETH!
passages.week_1b:
YOU ARE THE CHAMP
  OF MY CHOMPS!!
